title: zornia canescens
intro: Zornia canescens is a perennial legume plant native to the southeastern United States, commonly known as Gray Bird's Foot. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a tincture or in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
